hero.subtitle: We build invisible digital operating systems. We eliminate operational noise so your team can focus on what's essential: strategic growth and your business architecture.

lixita.title: Lixita
lixita.description: The challenge was clear: an inventory management bottleneck that paralyzed daily operations. We designed a continuous workflow integrating their existing ERP systems with real-time notifications.

solutionsHero.badge: See what's possible to automate today
solutionsHero.body: Technology has already solved the bottlenecks slowing down your growth. Discover the daily problems you shouldn't be solving with human time anymore.

MOD_01.title: Automatic Legal Review
MOD_01.description: Do you have contracts to review manually before signing? Automate reading and detect risks before they become problems.

MOD_02.title: System Connection
MOD_02.description: Is your team wasting time moving data from one system to another? Connect all your platforms and let information flow on its own.

MOD_03.title: Audit & Security
MOD_03.description: Worried that human error might compromise your company's security? Monitor your infrastructure policies 24/7.

MOD_04.title: Data Extraction
MOD_04.description: Someone on your team spending hours copying invoice data to Excel? Let AI read and organize the information instantly.

MOD_05.title: Real-time Analytics
MOD_05.description: Making decisions based on last week's reports? Visualize your company's exact performance right this second.

MOD_06.title: Total Synchronization
MOD_06.description: Are your databases, CRM and ERP disconnected? Bidirectionally sync your entire operation without human flaws.

MOD_07.title: Sales Automation
MOD_07.description: Losing clients because your sales team is slow to follow up? Automate qualification and initial contact without losing the human touch.

MOD_08.title: Customer Service Agent
MOD_08.description: Clients waiting hours for a WhatsApp reply? Resolve doubts, schedule appointments and sell 24/7 with a native AI agent.

MOD_09.title: Automatic Reports
MOD_09.description: Hate putting together reports on Monday morning? Receive complete, visual analytics directly in your inbox before you even reach the office.

modules.bottomCtaText: Can't find what you're looking for? Tell us your process and we'll build it.

form.title: System Diagnostic
form.subtitle: Complete this diagnostic to get a cost estimate for your automation
form.internalToolsPlaceholder: e.g., SQL Database, custom ERP, etc.

options.Tenemos automatizaciones pero queremos m: We have automations but want to improve them
